step_rationale: Endothelial dysfunction/activation marker; released from injured endothelium.
mechanism: Microparticles shed from activated/eroded endothelium reflecting endothelial damage and thrombotic potential.

references.title: Cell-Derived Microparticles and Acute Coronary Syndromes: Is there a Predictive Role for Microparticles?
Increased concentrations of platelet- and endothelial-derived microparticles in patients with myocardial infarction and reduced renal function- a descriptive study.
